items.label: Pass 0 — scaffold + constitution
items.next_action: Restore CLAUDE.md from git — the constitution must exist.

items.label: Pass 1 — pipeline core
items.next_action: Run the Pass 1 build session (watcher + stages).

items.label: Pass 2 — API running
items.next_action: Start the API: .venv/bin/uvicorn api.main:app

items.label: Pass 3 — cockpit UI built
items.next_action: Build the frontend: cd web && npm ci && npm run build

items.label: Pass 4 — integrations screen
items.next_action: Run the Pass 4 build session.

items.label: Pass T — todos, reminders, agenda
items.next_action: Run the Pass T build session.

items.label: Pass B — build tracker + model router
items.next_action: Run the Pass B build session.

items.label: Pass L — link capture + enrichment
items.next_action: Run the Pass L build session.

items.label: Pass 5 — hardening (watchdog, self-check)
items.next_action: Run the Pass 5 build session — after the loop is lived-in.

items.label: Pass 6 — Resource OS gallery
items.next_action: Run the Pass 6 build session (PASS-6-RESOURCE-OS-BUILD.md).

items.label: config.json filled (vault + inbox paths)
items.next_action: Copy config.example.json to config.json and fill in the four paths.

items.label: API access token set
items.next_action: Set a random string as api.auth_token in config.json.

items.label: whisper.cpp installed and runnable
items.next_action: brew install whisper-cpp, download the small.en model, put both paths in config.json.

items.label: A classification model key set
items.next_action: export at least one of GEMINI_API_KEY / GROQ_API_KEY / OPENROUTER_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the server's shell.

items.label: ntfy push configured
items.next_action: Fill ntfy.url and ntfy.topic in config.json, subscribe on your phone, then send a test push from Integrations.

items.label: Docker artifacts present
items.next_action: Run the Pass 10 build session (Dockerfile + compose + DEPLOY.md).

items.label: docker-compose.yml present
items.next_action: Run the Pass 10 build session (Dockerfile + compose + DEPLOY.md).

items.label: launchd agents installed (Mac path)
items.next_action: On the Mac: bash deploy/launchd/install.sh (DEPLOY.md Path B). Off-Mac this stays unticked — that's expected.

items.label: Cloudflare tunnel configured
items.next_action: Create the tunnel + hostname (DEPLOY.md, tunnel section), then record the hostname in config.json → deploy.tunnel_hostname.

items.label: Reachable from the internet (manual check)
items.next_action: From a phone on mobile data, open https://<your-hostname>/api/health through the Access login; when it answers, record the URL in config.json → deploy.public_url. Only a device outside your LAN can prove this — that's why it's manual.

items.label: Backlog ritual run
items.next_action: Run the Backlog Ritual: .venv/bin/python -m pipeline --backlog (Operating Manual §04).

items.label: Backlog cleared (CaptureInbox empty)
items.next_action: Keep running --backlog batches until the capture inbox is empty.

items.label: First real capture processed
items.next_action: Record a voice memo, share it to → Brain, and let the watcher process it.

items.label: 30-day clock started
items.next_action: The clock starts the day the backlog is clear AND a real capture has landed (Manual §04/§06).
